content.name: Pokey's Engine Mod Rebalance
content.description: Rebalances engine equipment mods into meaningful choices. Forward-thrust mods stay the straight-line speed pick, while other mods win on what forward thrust cannot buy: turning, strafing, boost duration and travel spool-up. Every mod gives exactly its printed value (no roll RNG), penalties are real instead of secretly refunded, and higher tiers are strictly stronger. Numbers only, no new wares, savegame-safe.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Engine Mod Rebalance
text.description: Rebalances engine equipment mods into meaningful choices. Forward-thrust mods stay the straight-line speed pick, while others win on turning, strafing, boost duration and travel spool-up. No roll RNG, real penalties, strict tiers. Numbers only, savegame-safe.
text.author: Pokey
